title: Sumy: Casualties reported
description: Man on bicycle killed in combined Russian attack on Sumy Oblast Russian forces carried out a combined attack on the Seredyna-Buda hromada in Sumy Oblast on 8 June, killing a 71-year-old man who was riding a bicycle. A hromada is an administrative unit designating a village, several villages, or a town, and their adjacent territories – ed. Read the full article on our website

title: Kharkiv: Air defense active
description: Ukrainian drones are already autonomously shooting down Shaheds 👥 The protection of the Ukrainian sky is getting a qualitatively new tool. This was announced by the Minister of Defense of Ukraine Mykhailo Fedorov. One of the members of Brave1 developed a system that takes over 95% of the entire process of intercepting enemy drones. All a person has to do is select a target and press the command. The technology has already proven its effectiveness in real combat...
description_en: Ukrainian drones are already autonomously shooting down Shaheds 👥 The protection of the Ukrainian sky is getting a qualitatively new tool. This was announced by the Minister of Defense of Ukraine Mykhailo Fedorov. One of the members of Brave1 developed a system that takes over 95% of the entire process of intercepting enemy drones. All a person has to do is select a target and press the command. The technology has already proven its effectiveness in real combat...
description_uk: Українські дрони вже автономно збивають Shahedи 👥 Захист українського неба отримує якісно новий інструмент. Про це повідомив Міністр Оборони України Михайло Федоров. Один із учасників Brave1 розробив систему, яка бере на себе 95% усього процесу перехоплення ворожих дронів. Людині залишається лише вибрати ціль і натиснути команду. Технологія вже підтвердила свою ефективність у реальних бойових...

title: Mariupol: Attack attack
description: Ukraine strikes Russia’s oil depot, radar station, other military targets, General Staff confirms. Ukraine’s military reportedly launched another onslaught of middle strikes on Russian and Russian-occupied regions overnight on June 8, striking multiple oil depots and electrical substations, Russian Telegram media channels reported.
